dashboard.title: Resume
dashboard.subtitle: Your context notebook
dashboard.noActiveTasksDesc: Create a new task to start saving your mental context.
dashboard.noContext: No context saved. Work and pause to save.

newTask.title: New Task
newTask.subtitle: Create a new context unit
newTask.taskTitlePlaceholder: Ex: Prepare proposal for client X

pause.title: Pause Context
pause.whereStoppedPlaceholder: Ex: compared options A and B; need to decide between lower price and better coverage.
pause.nextStep: What is the exact next step? *
pause.nextStepPlaceholder: Ex: read clause 4 of proposal C and confirm exclusions.
pause.addOptional: + Add optional details (blockers, mistakes to avoid...)
pause.blockerPlaceholder: Ex: I don't know if the contents value is undervalued.
pause.rejected: What have you already ruled out?
pause.rejectedPlaceholder: Ex: not using the old template version.
pause.mistake: What mistake should you avoid when you return?
pause.mistakePlaceholder: Ex: not deciding solely based on price.
pause.notePlaceholder: Ex: start with seismic coverage. The rest is on track.
pause.referencesPlaceholder: Ex: file_v2, local link, folder name, part X.

resume.title: Resume Context
resume.noContext: No context saved for this task.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your experience
settings.securityDesc: Protect the app with a PIN (only on this device).
settings.localDataDesc: Manage your data. Everything is saved only on your device.
settings.version: Caderno de Retoma de Contexto v1.0.0

alerts.pinLength: The PIN must have at least 4 digits.
alerts.pinRemoveConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the PIN?
alerts.importConfirm: This will replace all current data. Are you sure?
alerts.deleteConfirm: WARNING: This will permanently delete ALL tasks and contexts. Are you absolutely sure?

auth.instruction: Enter your PIN to access the context.
